title: n8n
html:
Stub. Open-source workflow-automation tool. First named in Yahir's automation thinking in 2025 11 22 cool automations.

What we know

  • Named as the orchestration layer for the death-detection final-message bot idea — heart-rate-zero → SOS → mass farewell.
  • First explicit workflow-tool callout by name in Yahir's corpus.
